name: opencode-context-assembler-skill
description: Context Assembler — pre-task artifact producer for opencode AI coding skills. Collects multi-source context into a user-reviewed immutable bundle before any AI task runs.

scripts.test:schema:valid: for f in tests/schemas/valid/*.json; do npx ajv validate -s schemas/v1.0.0/context-bundle.schema.json -r schemas/v1.0.0/context-bundle-item.schema.json -c ajv-formats -d "$f" --strict=false --spec=draft2020 || exit 1; done
scripts.test:schema:invalid: for f in tests/schemas/invalid/*.json; do npx ajv validate -s schemas/v1.0.0/context-bundle.schema.json -r schemas/v1.0.0/context-bundle-item.schema.json -c ajv-formats -d "$f" --strict=false --spec=draft2020 2>&1 | grep -q invalid || (echo "FAIL: $f unexpectedly passed" && exit 1); done
scripts.test:schema: npm run test:schema:valid && npm run test:schema:invalid
scripts.test: npm run test:schema && npm run test:storage && npm run test:connectors

author: Hoài Nhớ <nhoxtvt@gmail.com>
